mapper.select: SELECT * FROM order_info WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM order_info WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE order_info SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE order_info SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM order_info WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
